coachAM: Your gratitude entries consistently highlight opportunities, network, and *starting* new sprints, yet your Sleep and Training protocols are collapsing, indicating a fundamental disconnect between your stated intentions and the physical discipline required to *sustain* the elite output you crave; the "loop scrolling" and "laziness" you identify are symptoms, not the disease. The root cause is a catastrophic failure in self-governance, where the immediate gratification of comfort and distraction is systematically eroding the foundational physical and mental resilience necessary to fully capitalize on those opportunities and execute your vision at an elite level. Today, before anything else, rigorously execute your full Sleep Protocol tonight, ensuring zero screen time 60 minutes before bed and lights out by 9:30 PM.
